---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Salma"
date: "2026-05-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```




```{r }
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# COMPLETE DATA ANALYSIS PIPELINE
# Macaca nigra Behavioural Classification
# Models: MNLR, LASSO, Ridge, Elastic Net, RF, nnet NN, Keras NN
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# ── LIBRARIES ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
library(caret)
library(glmnet)
library(nnet)
library(randomForest)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 1: LOAD DATA
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
load("/Users/salma/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofArizona/Desktop/Thesis_grad/scan_MNLR.RData")

cat("Dataset loaded\n")
cat("N =", nrow(scan), "\n")
cat("Variables:", names(scan), "\n\n")

```

```{r}

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 2: 80:20 STRATIFIED SPLIT
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
set.seed(123)
trainIndex_80 <- createDataPartition(
  scan$Behaviour_Coarse, p = 0.80, list = FALSE)
train_80 <- scan[ trainIndex_80, ]
test_20  <- scan[-trainIndex_80, ]

cat("Train N =", nrow(train_80), "\n")
cat("Test  N =", nrow(test_20),  "\n\n")
```

```{r}

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 3: FACTOR LEVELS AND REFERENCE CATEGORIES
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# Behaviour — reference: Rest
train_80$Behaviour_Coarse <- relevel(
  as.factor(train_80$Behaviour_Coarse), ref = "Rest")
test_20$Behaviour_Coarse <- factor(
  test_20$Behaviour_Coarse,
  levels = levels(train_80$Behaviour_Coarse))

# Age — reference: Adult
train_80$Age.Class <- relevel(
  as.factor(train_80$Age.Class), ref = "Adult")
test_20$Age.Class <- factor(
  test_20$Age.Class,
  levels = levels(train_80$Age.Class))

# Sex — reference: Female
train_80$Sex <- relevel(
  as.factor(train_80$Sex), ref = "Female")
test_20$Sex <- factor(
  test_20$Sex,
  levels = levels(train_80$Sex))

# CRITICAL: Location levels — Forest → Roadside → RoadsideVeg
train_80$Location_Coarse <- factor(
  train_80$Location_Coarse,
  levels = c("Forest", "Roadside", "RoadsideVeg"))
test_20$Location_Coarse <- factor(
  test_20$Location_Coarse,
  levels = c("Forest", "Roadside", "RoadsideVeg"))

cat("Factor levels set.\n")
cat("Location:", levels(train_80$Location_Coarse), "\n")
cat("Behaviour:", levels(train_80$Behaviour_Coarse), "\n\n")

```

```{r}

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 4: CIRCULAR TIME ENCODING (k=1 Fourier)
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
train_80$hour     <- as.numeric(format(train_80$POSIX, "%H"))
train_80$hour_sin <- sin(2 * pi * train_80$hour / 24)
train_80$hour_cos <- cos(2 * pi * train_80$hour / 24)

test_20$hour      <- as.numeric(format(test_20$POSIX, "%H"))
test_20$hour_sin  <- sin(2 * pi * test_20$hour / 24)
test_20$hour_cos  <- cos(2 * pi * test_20$hour / 24)

cat("Circular time encoding done.\n\n")

```

```{r}

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 5: THREE-WAY INTERACTION MODEL MATRIX
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
X_train_80 <- model.matrix(
  ~ (Location_Coarse + Age.Class + Sex + hour_sin + hour_cos)^3,
  data = train_80)[, -1]

X_test_20 <- model.matrix(
  ~ (Location_Coarse + Age.Class + Sex + hour_sin + hour_cos)^3,
  data = test_20)[, -1]

y_train_80 <- train_80$Behaviour_Coarse
y_test_20  <- test_20$Behaviour_Coarse

cat("Model matrix dimensions:\n")
cat("Train:", nrow(X_train_80), "x", ncol(X_train_80), "\n")
cat("Test: ", nrow(X_test_20),  "x", ncol(X_test_20),  "\n\n")

```


```{r}

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 6: EVALUATION METRIC FUNCTIONS
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# One-hot encode y_test for probability metrics
y_onehot_test <- model.matrix(
  ~ y_test_20 - 1,
  data = data.frame(y_test_20 = y_test_20))
colnames(y_onehot_test) <- levels(y_test_20)

# 0-1 Loss
compute_01_loss <- function(pred_class, true_class) {
  mean(pred_class != true_class)
}

# Log-Loss (multinomial cross-entropy)
compute_logloss <- function(prob_mat, onehot_mat) {
  eps  <- 1e-15
  prob_mat <- pmax(pmin(as.matrix(prob_mat), 1-eps), eps)
  -mean(rowSums(as.matrix(onehot_mat) * log(prob_mat)))
}

# Brier Score
compute_brier <- function(prob_mat, onehot_mat) {
  mean(rowSums((as.matrix(prob_mat) - as.matrix(onehot_mat))^2))
}

# Spherical Score
compute_spherical <- function(prob_mat, onehot_mat) {
  prob_mat <- as.matrix(prob_mat)
  true_probs <- rowSums(prob_mat * as.matrix(onehot_mat))
  norms      <- sqrt(rowSums(prob_mat^2))
  mean(true_probs / norms)
}

```

```{r}

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 7: 5-FOLD CROSS-VALIDATION SETUP
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
set.seed(123)
folds <- createFolds(y_train_80, k = 5, list = TRUE)
cat("5-fold CV folds created.\n\n")

```

```{r}

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 8: FIT MODELS
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

results <- list()



# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# MODEL 1: MNLR (unpenalised baseline)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MODEL 1: MNLR\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n")

# 5-fold CV for MNLR
cv_errors_mnlr <- numeric(5)

for (f in seq_along(folds)) {
  val_idx  <- folds[[f]]
  train_cv <- train_80[-val_idx, ]
  val_cv   <- train_80[ val_idx, ]
  y_val    <- y_train_80[ val_idx]

  tryCatch({
    fit_tmp  <- multinom(
      Behaviour_Coarse ~ (Location_Coarse + Age.Class + Sex +
                            hour_sin + hour_cos)^3,
      data    = train_cv,
      MaxNWts = 10000,
      maxit   = 500,
      trace   = FALSE
    )
    pred_tmp <- predict(fit_tmp, newdata = val_cv, type = "class")
    cv_errors_mnlr[f] <- mean(pred_tmp != y_val)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("  MNLR CV fold %d failed: %s\n", f, conditionMessage(e)))
    cv_errors_mnlr[f] <<- NA
  })
}

cat(sprintf("CV 0-1 Loss: %.4f (SD: %.4f)\n",
            mean(cv_errors_mnlr, na.rm=TRUE), sd(cv_errors_mnlr, na.rm=TRUE)))

# Final fit on full training set
tryCatch({
  mnlr_fit <- multinom(
    Behaviour_Coarse ~ (Location_Coarse + Age.Class + Sex +
                          hour_sin + hour_cos)^3,
    data    = train_80,
    MaxNWts = 10000,
    maxit   = 500,
    trace   = FALSE
  )
  
    mnlr_fit

  prob_mnlr_test  <- predict(mnlr_fit, newdata = test_20, type = "probs")
  pred_mnlr_test  <- predict(mnlr_fit, newdata = test_20, type = "class")

  results$MNLR <- list(
    cv_01   = mean(cv_errors_mnlr, na.rm=TRUE),
    cv_sd   = sd(cv_errors_mnlr, na.rm=TRUE),
    test_01 = compute_01_loss(pred_mnlr_test, y_test_20),
    test_ll = compute_logloss(prob_mnlr_test, y_onehot_test),
    test_br = compute_brier(prob_mnlr_test, y_onehot_test),
    test_sp = compute_spherical(prob_mnlr_test, y_onehot_test)
  )
  cat("MNLR done.\n")
  cat(sprintf("  Test 0-1 Loss: %.4f\n", results$MNLR$test_01))
  cat(sprintf("  Test Log-Loss: %.4f\n", results$MNLR$test_ll))

}, error = function(e) {
  cat("MNLR failed:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
  results$MNLR <<- list(cv_01=mean(cv_errors_mnlr, na.rm=TRUE),
                        cv_sd=sd(cv_errors_mnlr, na.rm=TRUE),
                        test_01=NA, test_ll=NA, test_br=NA, test_sp=NA)
})

```

```{r}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# MODEL 2: LASSO (alpha = 1)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n══════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MODEL 2: LASSO\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n")

# 5-fold CV for lambda selection
set.seed(123)
cv_errors_lasso <- numeric(5)

for (f in seq_along(folds)) {
  val_idx   <- folds[[f]]
  X_tr      <- X_train_80[-val_idx, ]
  X_val     <- X_train_80[ val_idx, ]
  y_tr      <- y_train_80[-val_idx]
  y_val     <- y_train_80[ val_idx]

  fit_tmp   <- cv.glmnet(X_tr, y_tr, family="multinomial",
                         alpha=1, nfolds=5)
  pred_tmp  <- predict(fit_tmp, newx=X_val, s="lambda.min",
                       type="class")[,1]
  cv_errors_lasso[f] <- mean(pred_tmp != y_val)
}

cat(sprintf("CV 0-1 Loss: %.4f (SD: %.4f)\n",
            mean(cv_errors_lasso), sd(cv_errors_lasso)))

# Final fit on full training set
set.seed(123)
lasso_final_80 <- cv.glmnet(
  x      = X_train_80,
  y      = y_train_80,
  family = "multinomial",
  alpha  = 1,
  nfolds = 10
)

# Test set evaluation
prob_lasso_test <- predict(lasso_final_80, newx=X_test_20,
                           s="lambda.min", type="response")[,,1]
pred_lasso_test <- predict(lasso_final_80, newx=X_test_20,
                           s="lambda.min", type="class")[,1]
colnames(prob_lasso_test) <- levels(y_test_20)

results$LASSO <- list(
  cv_01     = mean(cv_errors_lasso),
  cv_sd     = sd(cv_errors_lasso),
  test_01   = compute_01_loss(pred_lasso_test, y_test_20),
  test_ll   = compute_logloss(prob_lasso_test, y_onehot_test),
  test_br   = compute_brier(prob_lasso_test, y_onehot_test),
  test_sp   = compute_spherical(prob_lasso_test, y_onehot_test)
)

cat(sprintf("Test 0-1 Loss: %.4f\n", results$LASSO$test_01))
cat(sprintf("Test Log-Loss: %.4f\n", results$LASSO$test_ll))
cat(sprintf("Test Brier:    %.4f\n", results$LASSO$test_br))
cat(sprintf("Test Spherical:%.4f\n", results$LASSO$test_sp))
cat(sprintf("lambda.min:    %.6f\n", lasso_final_80$lambda.min))

# Sanity check — HD probabilities
hour_fixed <- 8
sanity_grid <- data.frame(
  Location_Coarse = factor(
    c("Forest","Roadside","RoadsideVeg"),
    levels = c("Forest","Roadside","RoadsideVeg")),
  Age.Class = factor("Adult",  levels = levels(train_80$Age.Class)),
  Sex       = factor("Female", levels = levels(train_80$Sex)),
  hour      = hour_fixed,
  hour_sin  = sin(2*pi*hour_fixed/24),
  hour_cos  = cos(2*pi*hour_fixed/24)
)
X_sanity <- model.matrix(
  ~(Location_Coarse+Age.Class+Sex+hour_sin+hour_cos)^3,
  data=sanity_grid)[,-1]
prob_sanity <- predict(lasso_final_80, newx=X_sanity,
                       s="lambda.min", type="response")[,,1]
colnames(prob_sanity) <- levels(y_train_80)
rownames(prob_sanity) <- c("Forest","Roadside","RoadsideVeg")
cat("\nHD probabilities (Roadside must be highest):\n")
print(round(prob_sanity[,"Human Directed", drop=FALSE], 3))

```

```{r}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# MODEL 3: RIDGE (alpha = 0)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n══════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MODEL 3: RIDGE\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n")

cv_errors_ridge <- numeric(5)

for (f in seq_along(folds)) {
  val_idx  <- folds[[f]]
  X_tr     <- X_train_80[-val_idx, ]
  X_val    <- X_train_80[ val_idx, ]
  y_tr     <- y_train_80[-val_idx]
  y_val    <- y_train_80[ val_idx]

  fit_tmp  <- cv.glmnet(X_tr, y_tr, family="multinomial",
                        alpha=0, nfolds=5)
  pred_tmp <- predict(fit_tmp, newx=X_val, s="lambda.min",
                      type="class")[,1]
  cv_errors_ridge[f] <- mean(pred_tmp != y_val)
}

cat(sprintf("CV 0-1 Loss: %.4f (SD: %.4f)\n",
            mean(cv_errors_ridge), sd(cv_errors_ridge)))

set.seed(123)
ridge_final_80 <- cv.glmnet(
  x      = X_train_80,
  y      = y_train_80,
  family = "multinomial",
  alpha  = 0,
  nfolds = 10
)

prob_ridge_test <- predict(ridge_final_80, newx=X_test_20,
                           s="lambda.min", type="response")[,,1]
pred_ridge_test <- predict(ridge_final_80, newx=X_test_20,
                           s="lambda.min", type="class")[,1]
colnames(prob_ridge_test) <- levels(y_test_20)

results$Ridge <- list(
  cv_01   = mean(cv_errors_ridge),
  cv_sd   = sd(cv_errors_ridge),
  test_01 = compute_01_loss(pred_ridge_test, y_test_20),
  test_ll = compute_logloss(prob_ridge_test, y_onehot_test),
  test_br = compute_brier(prob_ridge_test, y_onehot_test),
  test_sp = compute_spherical(prob_ridge_test, y_onehot_test)
)
cat(sprintf("Test 0-1 Loss: %.4f\n", results$Ridge$test_01))
cat(sprintf("Test Log-Loss: %.4f\n", results$Ridge$test_ll))

```

```{r}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# MODEL 4: ELASTIC NET alpha = 0.5
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n══════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MODEL 4: ELASTIC NET (alpha=0.5)\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n")

cv_errors_en05 <- numeric(5)

for (f in seq_along(folds)) {
  val_idx  <- folds[[f]]
  X_tr     <- X_train_80[-val_idx, ]
  X_val    <- X_train_80[ val_idx, ]
  y_tr     <- y_train_80[-val_idx]
  y_val    <- y_train_80[ val_idx]

  fit_tmp  <- cv.glmnet(X_tr, y_tr, family="multinomial",
                        alpha=0.5, nfolds=5)
  pred_tmp <- predict(fit_tmp, newx=X_val, s="lambda.min",
                      type="class")[,1]
  cv_errors_en05[f] <- mean(pred_tmp != y_val)
}

cat(sprintf("CV 0-1 Loss: %.4f (SD: %.4f)\n",
            mean(cv_errors_en05), sd(cv_errors_en05)))

set.seed(123)
en05_final_80 <- cv.glmnet(
  x      = X_train_80,
  y      = y_train_80,
  family = "multinomial",
  alpha  = 0.5,
  nfolds = 10
)

prob_en05_test <- predict(en05_final_80, newx=X_test_20,
                          s="lambda.min", type="response")[,,1]
pred_en05_test <- predict(en05_final_80, newx=X_test_20,
                          s="lambda.min", type="class")[,1]
colnames(prob_en05_test) <- levels(y_test_20)

results$EN_05 <- list(
  cv_01   = mean(cv_errors_en05),
  cv_sd   = sd(cv_errors_en05),
  test_01 = compute_01_loss(pred_en05_test, y_test_20),
  test_ll = compute_logloss(prob_en05_test, y_onehot_test),
  test_br = compute_brier(prob_en05_test, y_onehot_test),
  test_sp = compute_spherical(prob_en05_test, y_onehot_test)
)
cat(sprintf("Test 0-1 Loss: %.4f\n", results$EN_05$test_01))
cat(sprintf("Test Log-Loss: %.4f\n", results$EN_05$test_ll))
```

```{r}
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# MODEL 5: ELASTIC NET alpha = 0.7
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n══════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MODEL 5: ELASTIC NET (alpha=0.7)\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n")

cv_errors_en07 <- numeric(5)

for (f in seq_along(folds)) {
  val_idx  <- folds[[f]]
  X_tr     <- X_train_80[-val_idx, ]
  X_val    <- X_train_80[ val_idx, ]
  y_tr     <- y_train_80[-val_idx]
  y_val    <- y_train_80[ val_idx]

  fit_tmp  <- cv.glmnet(X_tr, y_tr, family="multinomial",
                        alpha=0.7, nfolds=5)
  pred_tmp <- predict(fit_tmp, newx=X_val, s="lambda.min",
                      type="class")[,1]
  cv_errors_en07[f] <- mean(pred_tmp != y_val)
}

cat(sprintf("CV 0-1 Loss: %.4f (SD: %.4f)\n",
            mean(cv_errors_en07), sd(cv_errors_en07)))

set.seed(123)
en07_final_80 <- cv.glmnet(
  x      = X_train_80,
  y      = y_train_80,
  family = "multinomial",
  alpha  = 0.7,
  nfolds = 10
)

prob_en07_test <- predict(en07_final_80, newx=X_test_20,
                          s="lambda.min", type="response")[,,1]
pred_en07_test <- predict(en07_final_80, newx=X_test_20,
                          s="lambda.min", type="class")[,1]
colnames(prob_en07_test) <- levels(y_test_20)

results$EN_07 <- list(
  cv_01   = mean(cv_errors_en07),
  cv_sd   = sd(cv_errors_en07),
  test_01 = compute_01_loss(pred_en07_test, y_test_20),
  test_ll = compute_logloss(prob_en07_test, y_onehot_test),
  test_br = compute_brier(prob_en07_test, y_onehot_test),
  test_sp = compute_spherical(prob_en07_test, y_onehot_test)
)
cat(sprintf("Test 0-1 Loss: %.4f\n", results$EN_07$test_01))
cat(sprintf("Test Log-Loss: %.4f\n", results$EN_07$test_ll))

```


```{r}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# MODEL 6: RANDOM FOREST
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n══════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MODEL 6: RANDOM FOREST\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n")

cv_errors_rf <- numeric(5)

# FIX: set seed before CV loop for reproducibility
set.seed(123)
for (f in seq_along(folds)) {
  val_idx  <- folds[[f]]
  X_tr     <- X_train_80[-val_idx, ]
  X_val    <- X_train_80[ val_idx, ]
  y_tr     <- y_train_80[-val_idx]
  y_val    <- y_train_80[ val_idx]

  fit_tmp  <- randomForest(
    x = X_tr, y = y_tr,
    ntree = 500,
    mtry  = floor(sqrt(ncol(X_tr))))
  pred_tmp <- predict(fit_tmp, newdata=X_val, type="class")
  cv_errors_rf[f] <- mean(pred_tmp != y_val)
}

cat(sprintf("CV 0-1 Loss: %.4f (SD: %.4f)\n",
            mean(cv_errors_rf), sd(cv_errors_rf)))

set.seed(123)
rf_final_80 <- randomForest(
  x     = X_train_80,
  y     = y_train_80,
  ntree = 500,
  mtry  = floor(sqrt(ncol(X_train_80)))
)

prob_rf_test <- predict(rf_final_80, newdata=X_test_20, type="prob")
pred_rf_test <- predict(rf_final_80, newdata=X_test_20, type="class")

results$RF <- list(
  cv_01   = mean(cv_errors_rf),
  cv_sd   = sd(cv_errors_rf),
  test_01 = compute_01_loss(pred_rf_test, y_test_20),
  test_ll = compute_logloss(prob_rf_test, y_onehot_test),
  test_br = compute_brier(prob_rf_test, y_onehot_test),
  test_sp = compute_spherical(prob_rf_test, y_onehot_test)
)
cat(sprintf("Test 0-1 Loss: %.4f\n", results$RF$test_01))
cat(sprintf("Test Log-Loss: %.4f\n", results$RF$test_ll))

```

```{r}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# MODEL 7: NEURAL NETWORK (nnet)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n══════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MODEL 7: NEURAL NETWORK (nnet)\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n")

# Normalise predictors for NN
X_train_norm <- scale(X_train_80)
X_test_norm  <- scale(X_test_20,
                      center = attr(X_train_norm, "scaled:center"),
                      scale  = attr(X_train_norm, "scaled:scale"))

cv_errors_nn <- numeric(5)

for (f in seq_along(folds)) {
  val_idx  <- folds[[f]]
  X_tr     <- X_train_norm[-val_idx, ]
  X_val    <- X_train_norm[ val_idx, ]
  y_tr     <- y_train_80[-val_idx]
  y_val    <- y_train_80[ val_idx]

  fit_tmp  <- nnet(
    x       = X_tr,
    y       = class.ind(y_tr),
    size    = 5,
    decay   = 0.1,
    maxit   = 200,
    softmax = TRUE,
    trace   = FALSE
  )
  # FIX: nnet with softmax+class.ind returns raw probabilities;
  # type="class" is not valid — use which.max on the prob matrix instead
  prob_tmp <- predict(fit_tmp, newdata = X_val)
  pred_tmp <- levels(y_tr)[apply(prob_tmp, 1, which.max)]
  cv_errors_nn[f] <- mean(pred_tmp != y_val)
}

cat(sprintf("CV 0-1 Loss: %.4f (SD: %.4f)\n",
            mean(cv_errors_nn), sd(cv_errors_nn)))

set.seed(123)
nn_final_80 <- nnet(
  x       = X_train_norm,
  y       = class.ind(y_train_80),
  size    = 5,
  decay   = 0.1,
  maxit   = 500,
  softmax = TRUE,
  trace   = FALSE
)

prob_nn_test <- predict(nn_final_80, newdata=X_test_norm, type="raw")
colnames(prob_nn_test) <- levels(y_train_80)
pred_nn_test <- levels(y_train_80)[apply(prob_nn_test, 1, which.max)]

results$NN <- list(
  cv_01   = mean(cv_errors_nn),
  cv_sd   = sd(cv_errors_nn),
  test_01 = compute_01_loss(pred_nn_test, y_test_20),
  test_ll = compute_logloss(prob_nn_test, y_onehot_test),
  test_br = compute_brier(prob_nn_test, y_onehot_test),
  test_sp = compute_spherical(prob_nn_test, y_onehot_test)
)
cat(sprintf("Test 0-1 Loss: %.4f\n", results$NN$test_01))
cat(sprintf("Test Log-Loss: %.4f\n", results$NN$test_ll))

```

```{r}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# MODEL 8: KERAS DEEP NEURAL NETWORK
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n══════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MODEL 8: KERAS DEEP NEURAL NETWORK\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n")

library(keras)

# One-hot encode outcomes for keras
n_classes   <- length(levels(y_train_80))
y_train_int <- as.integer(y_train_80) - 1L
y_test_int  <- as.integer(y_test_20)  - 1L
y_train_oh  <- to_categorical(y_train_int, num_classes = n_classes)
y_test_oh   <- to_categorical(y_test_int,  num_classes = n_classes)

X_train_k   <- as.matrix(X_train_norm)
X_test_k    <- as.matrix(X_test_norm)

# Grid search parameters
grid <- expand.grid(
  layer1  = c(8, 16, 32),
  layer2  = c(0, 4, 8),
  dropout = c(0, 0.2, 0.3),
  l2_reg  = c(0.001, 0.01),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

cat(sprintf("Grid search: %d architectures\n", nrow(grid)))

best_cv_error <- Inf
best_params   <- NULL
grid_results  <- data.frame()

# FIX: track fold errors per architecture so we can report cv_sd
for (i in seq_len(nrow(grid))) {

  p <- grid[i, ]

  # Build model
  build_model <- function(l1, l2_nodes, do, l2r) {
    model <- keras_model_sequential()
    model %>%
      layer_dense(units       = l1,
                  activation  = "relu",
                  input_shape = ncol(X_train_k),
                  kernel_regularizer = regularizer_l2(l2r))
    if (do > 0) model %>% layer_dropout(rate = do)
    if (l2_nodes > 0) {
      model %>%
        layer_dense(units      = l2_nodes,
                    activation = "relu",
                    kernel_regularizer = regularizer_l2(l2r))
      if (do > 0) model %>% layer_dropout(rate = do)
    }
    model %>%
      layer_dense(units      = n_classes,
                  activation = "softmax")
    model %>% compile(
      loss      = "categorical_crossentropy",
      optimizer = optimizer_adam(),
      metrics   = c("accuracy")
    )
    model
  }

  # 5-fold CV
  fold_errors <- numeric(5)
  for (f in seq_along(folds)) {
    val_idx <- folds[[f]]
    X_tr_k  <- X_train_k[-val_idx, ]
    X_val_k <- X_train_k[ val_idx, ]
    y_tr_k  <- y_train_oh[-val_idx, ]
    y_val_k <- y_train_oh[ val_idx, ]

    m <- build_model(p$layer1, p$layer2, p$dropout, p$l2_reg)
    m %>% fit(
      X_tr_k, y_tr_k,
      epochs          = 50,
      batch_size      = 32,
      validation_data = list(X_val_k, y_val_k),
      verbose         = 0
    )
    preds <- m %>% predict(X_val_k)
    pred_class <- levels(y_train_80)[apply(preds, 1, which.max)]
    true_class <- y_train_80[val_idx]
    fold_errors[f] <- mean(pred_class != true_class)
  }

  cv_err <- mean(fold_errors)
  grid_results <- rbind(grid_results, data.frame(
    layer1=p$layer1, layer2=p$layer2,
    dropout=p$dropout, l2_reg=p$l2_reg,
    cv_error=cv_err, cv_sd=sd(fold_errors)))

  cat(sprintf("  [%2d/%d] L1=%2d L2=%d DO=%.1f L2R=%.3f → CV=%.4f\n",
              i, nrow(grid),
              p$layer1, p$layer2, p$dropout, p$l2_reg, cv_err))

  if (cv_err < best_cv_error) {
    best_cv_error    <- cv_err
    best_cv_sd       <- sd(fold_errors)   # FIX: capture SD for best model
    best_params      <- p
  }
}

cat(sprintf("\nBest architecture: Layer1=%d Layer2=%d Dropout=%.1f L2=%.3f\n",
            best_params$layer1, best_params$layer2,
            best_params$dropout, best_params$l2_reg))
cat(sprintf("Best CV Error: %.4f (SD: %.4f)\n", best_cv_error, best_cv_sd))

# Save grid results
write.csv(grid_results, "keras_deep_nn_gridsearch.csv", row.names=FALSE)

# Refit best architecture on full training set
keras_final_80 <- build_model(
  best_params$layer1,
  best_params$layer2,
  best_params$dropout,
  best_params$l2_reg
)

keras_final_80 %>% fit(
  X_train_k, y_train_oh,
  epochs     = 100,
  batch_size = 32,
  verbose    = 0
)

prob_keras_test <- keras_final_80 %>% predict(X_test_k)
colnames(prob_keras_test) <- levels(y_train_80)
pred_keras_test <- levels(y_train_80)[apply(prob_keras_test, 1, which.max)]

results$Keras <- list(
  cv_01   = best_cv_error,
  cv_sd   = best_cv_sd,          # FIX: now populated instead of NA
  test_01 = compute_01_loss(pred_keras_test, y_test_20),
  test_ll = compute_logloss(prob_keras_test, y_onehot_test),
  test_br = compute_brier(prob_keras_test, y_onehot_test),
  test_sp = compute_spherical(prob_keras_test, y_onehot_test)
)
cat(sprintf("Test 0-1 Loss: %.4f\n", results$Keras$test_01))
cat(sprintf("Test Log-Loss: %.4f\n", results$Keras$test_ll))

# Save best model
keras_final_80 %>% save_model_hdf5("keras_best_model.h5")
cat("Keras model saved: keras_best_model.h5\n")

```

```{r}

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 9: MODEL COMPARISON TABLE
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
cat("\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MODEL COMPARISON — FINAL RESULTS\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

model_names <- c("MNLR","LASSO","Ridge","EN_05","EN_07","RF","NN","Keras")

cat(sprintf("%-10s  %8s  %8s  %8s  %8s  %8s  %8s\n",
            "Model","CV Loss","CV SD","Test 0-1","Log-Loss","Brier","Spherical"))
cat(strrep("-", 70), "\n")

for (nm in model_names) {
  r <- results[[nm]]
  if (is.null(r)) next
  cat(sprintf("%-10s  %8s  %8s  %8.4f  %8.4f  %8.4f  %8.4f\n",
              nm,
              ifelse(is.na(r$cv_01), "    NA", sprintf("%.4f", r$cv_01)),
              ifelse(is.null(r$cv_sd)||is.na(r$cv_sd), "    NA",
                     sprintf("%.4f", r$cv_sd)),
              r$test_01, r$test_ll, r$test_br, r$test_sp))
}

cat(strrep("-", 70), "\n")
cat("Lower 0-1 Loss, Log-Loss, Brier = better\n")
cat("Higher Spherical = better\n\n")

# Save comparison table
comp_df <- data.frame(
  Model     = model_names,
  CV_01Loss = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$cv_01),
  CV_SD     = sapply(model_names, function(n) {
    s <- results[[n]]$cv_sd
    ifelse(is.null(s), NA, s)
  }),
  Test_01   = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$test_01),
  LogLoss   = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$test_ll),
  Brier     = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$test_br),
  Spherical = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$test_sp)
)

write.csv(comp_df, "model_comparison_results.csv", row.names=FALSE)
cat("Saved: model_comparison_results.csv\n")

cat("\n══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("ANALYSIS COMPLETE\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("Key objects in environment:\n")
cat("  lasso_final_80  — final LASSO model\n")
cat("  rf_final_80     — final Random Forest model\n")
cat("  nn_final_80     — final nnet Neural Network\n")
cat("  keras_final_80  — final Keras Deep NN\n")
cat("  train_80        — training data with hour/hour_sin/hour_cos\n")
cat("  test_20         — test data\n")
cat("  X_train_80      — 36-col training matrix\n")
cat("  X_test_20       — 36-col test matrix\n")
cat("  y_train_80      — training outcome factor\n")
cat("  y_test_20       — test outcome factor\n")

```


#Again

```{r }
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# COMPLETE DATA ANALYSIS PIPELINE
# Macaca nigra Behavioural Classification
# Models: MNLR, LASSO, Ridge, Elastic Net, RF, nnet NN, Keras NN
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# ── LIBRARIES ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
library(caret)
library(glmnet)
library(nnet)
library(randomForest)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 1: LOAD DATA
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
load("/Users/salma/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofArizona/Desktop/Thesis_grad/scan_MNLR.RData")

cat("Dataset loaded\n")
cat("N =", nrow(scan), "\n")
cat("Variables:", names(scan), "\n\n")

```


```{r}

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 2: 80:20 STRATIFIED SPLIT
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
set.seed(123)
trainIndex_80 <- createDataPartition(
  scan$Behaviour_Coarse, p = 0.80, list = FALSE)
train_80 <- scan[ trainIndex_80, ]
test_20  <- scan[-trainIndex_80, ]

cat("Train N =", nrow(train_80), "\n")
cat("Test  N =", nrow(test_20),  "\n\n")

```

```{r}

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 3: FACTOR LEVELS AND REFERENCE CATEGORIES
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# Behaviour — reference: Rest
train_80$Behaviour_Coarse <- relevel(
  as.factor(train_80$Behaviour_Coarse), ref = "Rest")
test_20$Behaviour_Coarse <- factor(
  test_20$Behaviour_Coarse,
  levels = levels(train_80$Behaviour_Coarse))

# Age — reference: Adult
train_80$Age.Class <- relevel(
  as.factor(train_80$Age.Class), ref = "Adult")
test_20$Age.Class <- factor(
  test_20$Age.Class,
  levels = levels(train_80$Age.Class))

# Sex — reference: Female
train_80$Sex <- relevel(
  as.factor(train_80$Sex), ref = "Female")
test_20$Sex <- factor(
  test_20$Sex,
  levels = levels(train_80$Sex))

# CRITICAL: Location levels — Forest → Roadside → RoadsideVeg
train_80$Location_Coarse <- factor(
  train_80$Location_Coarse,
  levels = c("Forest", "Roadside", "RoadsideVeg"))
test_20$Location_Coarse <- factor(
  test_20$Location_Coarse,
  levels = c("Forest", "Roadside", "RoadsideVeg"))

cat("Factor levels set.\n")
cat("Location:", levels(train_80$Location_Coarse), "\n")
cat("Behaviour:", levels(train_80$Behaviour_Coarse), "\n\n")

```


```{r}

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 4: CIRCULAR TIME ENCODING (k=1 Fourier)
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
train_80$hour     <- as.numeric(format(train_80$POSIX, "%H"))
train_80$hour_sin <- sin(2 * pi * train_80$hour / 24)
train_80$hour_cos <- cos(2 * pi * train_80$hour / 24)

test_20$hour      <- as.numeric(format(test_20$POSIX, "%H"))
test_20$hour_sin  <- sin(2 * pi * test_20$hour / 24)
test_20$hour_cos  <- cos(2 * pi * test_20$hour / 24)

cat("Circular time encoding done.\n\n")

```

```{r}

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 5: THREE-WAY INTERACTION MODEL MATRIX
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
X_train_80 <- model.matrix(
  ~ (Location_Coarse + Age.Class + Sex + hour_sin + hour_cos)^3,
  data = train_80)[, -1]

X_test_20 <- model.matrix(
  ~ (Location_Coarse + Age.Class + Sex + hour_sin + hour_cos)^3,
  data = test_20)[, -1]

y_train_80 <- train_80$Behaviour_Coarse
y_test_20  <- test_20$Behaviour_Coarse

cat("Model matrix dimensions:\n")
cat("Train:", nrow(X_train_80), "x", ncol(X_train_80), "\n")
cat("Test: ", nrow(X_test_20),  "x", ncol(X_test_20),  "\n\n")

```

```{r}

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 6: EVALUATION METRIC FUNCTIONS
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# One-hot encode y_test for probability metrics
y_onehot_test <- model.matrix(
  ~ y_test_20 - 1,
  data = data.frame(y_test_20 = y_test_20))
colnames(y_onehot_test) <- levels(y_test_20)

# Helper: one-hot encode a factor vector
make_onehot <- function(y_factor) {
  oh <- model.matrix(~ y_factor - 1,
                     data = data.frame(y_factor = y_factor))
  colnames(oh) <- levels(y_factor)
  oh
}

# 0-1 Loss
compute_01_loss <- function(pred_class, true_class) {
  mean(pred_class != true_class)
}

# Log-Loss (multinomial cross-entropy)
compute_logloss <- function(prob_mat, onehot_mat) {
  eps      <- 1e-15
  prob_mat <- pmax(pmin(as.matrix(prob_mat), 1 - eps), eps)
  -mean(rowSums(as.matrix(onehot_mat) * log(prob_mat)))
}

# Brier Score
compute_brier <- function(prob_mat, onehot_mat) {
  mean(rowSums((as.matrix(prob_mat) - as.matrix(onehot_mat))^2))
}

# Spherical Score
compute_spherical <- function(prob_mat, onehot_mat) {
  prob_mat   <- as.matrix(prob_mat)
  true_probs <- rowSums(prob_mat * as.matrix(onehot_mat))
  norms      <- sqrt(rowSums(prob_mat^2))
  mean(true_probs / norms)
}

# Helper: compute all 4 metrics from prob matrix + true factor
compute_all_metrics <- function(prob_mat, true_factor) {
  oh <- make_onehot(true_factor)
  # align columns
  prob_mat <- prob_mat[, colnames(oh), drop = FALSE]
  pred_class <- colnames(prob_mat)[apply(prob_mat, 1, which.max)]
  list(
    m_01 = compute_01_loss(pred_class, as.character(true_factor)),
    m_ll = compute_logloss(prob_mat, oh),
    m_br = compute_brier(prob_mat, oh),
    m_sp = compute_spherical(prob_mat, oh)
  )
}

```

```{r}

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 7: 5-FOLD CROSS-VALIDATION SETUP
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
set.seed(123)
folds <- createFolds(y_train_80, k = 5, list = TRUE)
cat("5-fold CV folds created.\n\n")

```

```{r}

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 8: FIT MODELS
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

results <- list()

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# MODEL 1: MNLR (unpenalised baseline)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MODEL 1: MNLR\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n")

cv_mnlr <- matrix(NA, nrow=5, ncol=4,
                  dimnames=list(NULL, c("01","ll","br","sp")))

for (f in seq_along(folds)) {
  val_idx  <- folds[[f]]
  train_cv <- train_80[-val_idx, ]
  val_cv   <- train_80[ val_idx, ]
  y_val    <- y_train_80[ val_idx]

  tryCatch({
    fit_tmp  <- multinom(
      Behaviour_Coarse ~ (Location_Coarse + Age.Class + Sex +
                            hour_sin + hour_cos)^3,
      data    = train_cv,
      MaxNWts = 10000,
      maxit   = 500,
      trace   = FALSE
    )
    prob_tmp <- predict(fit_tmp, newdata = val_cv, type = "probs")
    m        <- compute_all_metrics(prob_tmp, y_val)
    cv_mnlr[f, ] <- c(m$m_01, m$m_ll, m$m_br, m$m_sp)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("  MNLR CV fold %d failed: %s\n", f, conditionMessage(e)))
  })
}

cat(sprintf("CV 0-1 Loss: %.4f (SD: %.4f)\n",
            mean(cv_mnlr[,"01"], na.rm=TRUE), sd(cv_mnlr[,"01"], na.rm=TRUE)))

# Final fit on full training set
tryCatch({
  mnlr_fit       <- multinom(
    Behaviour_Coarse ~ (Location_Coarse + Age.Class + Sex +
                          hour_sin + hour_cos)^3,
    data    = train_80,
    MaxNWts = 10000,
    maxit   = 500,
    trace   = FALSE
  )
  prob_mnlr_test <- predict(mnlr_fit, newdata = test_20, type = "probs")
  m_test         <- compute_all_metrics(prob_mnlr_test, y_test_20)

  results$MNLR <- list(
    cv_01 = mean(cv_mnlr[,"01"], na.rm=TRUE), cv_sd = sd(cv_mnlr[,"01"], na.rm=TRUE),
    cv_ll = mean(cv_mnlr[,"ll"], na.rm=TRUE), cv_ll_sd = sd(cv_mnlr[,"ll"], na.rm=TRUE),
    cv_br = mean(cv_mnlr[,"br"], na.rm=TRUE), cv_br_sd = sd(cv_mnlr[,"br"], na.rm=TRUE),
    cv_sp = mean(cv_mnlr[,"sp"], na.rm=TRUE), cv_sp_sd = sd(cv_mnlr[,"sp"], na.rm=TRUE),
    test_01 = m_test$m_01, test_ll = m_test$m_ll,
    test_br = m_test$m_br, test_sp = m_test$m_sp
  )
  cat("MNLR done.\n")
  cat(sprintf("  Test 0-1 Loss: %.4f\n", results$MNLR$test_01))
  cat(sprintf("  Test Log-Loss: %.4f\n", results$MNLR$test_ll))

}, error = function(e) {
  cat("MNLR final fit failed:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
  results$MNLR <<- list(
    cv_01=mean(cv_mnlr[,"01"],na.rm=TRUE), cv_sd=sd(cv_mnlr[,"01"],na.rm=TRUE),
    cv_ll=mean(cv_mnlr[,"ll"],na.rm=TRUE), cv_ll_sd=sd(cv_mnlr[,"ll"],na.rm=TRUE),
    cv_br=mean(cv_mnlr[,"br"],na.rm=TRUE), cv_br_sd=sd(cv_mnlr[,"br"],na.rm=TRUE),
    cv_sp=mean(cv_mnlr[,"sp"],na.rm=TRUE), cv_sp_sd=sd(cv_mnlr[,"sp"],na.rm=TRUE),
    test_01=NA, test_ll=NA, test_br=NA, test_sp=NA)
})

```


```{r}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# MODEL 2: LASSO (alpha = 1)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n══════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MODEL 2: LASSO\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n")

set.seed(123)
cv_lasso <- matrix(NA, nrow=5, ncol=4,
                   dimnames=list(NULL, c("01","ll","br","sp")))

for (f in seq_along(folds)) {
  val_idx  <- folds[[f]]
  X_tr     <- X_train_80[-val_idx, ]
  X_val    <- X_train_80[ val_idx, ]
  y_tr     <- y_train_80[-val_idx]
  y_val    <- y_train_80[ val_idx]

  fit_tmp  <- cv.glmnet(X_tr, y_tr, family="multinomial", alpha=1, nfolds=5)
  prob_tmp <- predict(fit_tmp, newx=X_val, s="lambda.min", type="response")[,,1]
  colnames(prob_tmp) <- levels(y_tr)
  m <- compute_all_metrics(prob_tmp, y_val)
  cv_lasso[f, ] <- c(m$m_01, m$m_ll, m$m_br, m$m_sp)
}

cat(sprintf("CV 0-1 Loss: %.4f (SD: %.4f)\n",
            mean(cv_lasso[,"01"]), sd(cv_lasso[,"01"])))

set.seed(123)
lasso_final_80 <- cv.glmnet(
  x=X_train_80, y=y_train_80, family="multinomial", alpha=1, nfolds=10)

prob_lasso_test <- predict(lasso_final_80, newx=X_test_20,
                           s="lambda.min", type="response")[,,1]
colnames(prob_lasso_test) <- levels(y_test_20)
m_test <- compute_all_metrics(prob_lasso_test, y_test_20)

results$LASSO <- list(
  cv_01=mean(cv_lasso[,"01"]), cv_sd=sd(cv_lasso[,"01"]),
  cv_ll=mean(cv_lasso[,"ll"]), cv_ll_sd=sd(cv_lasso[,"ll"]),
  cv_br=mean(cv_lasso[,"br"]), cv_br_sd=sd(cv_lasso[,"br"]),
  cv_sp=mean(cv_lasso[,"sp"]), cv_sp_sd=sd(cv_lasso[,"sp"]),
  test_01=m_test$m_01, test_ll=m_test$m_ll,
  test_br=m_test$m_br, test_sp=m_test$m_sp
)
cat(sprintf("Test 0-1 Loss: %.4f\n", results$LASSO$test_01))
cat(sprintf("Test Log-Loss: %.4f\n", results$LASSO$test_ll))
cat(sprintf("lambda.min:    %.6f\n", lasso_final_80$lambda.min))

# Sanity check — HD probabilities
hour_fixed <- 8
sanity_grid <- data.frame(
  Location_Coarse = factor(c("Forest","Roadside","RoadsideVeg"),
                           levels = c("Forest","Roadside","RoadsideVeg")),
  Age.Class = factor("Adult",  levels = levels(train_80$Age.Class)),
  Sex       = factor("Female", levels = levels(train_80$Sex)),
  hour      = hour_fixed,
  hour_sin  = sin(2*pi*hour_fixed/24),
  hour_cos  = cos(2*pi*hour_fixed/24))
X_sanity    <- model.matrix(
  ~(Location_Coarse+Age.Class+Sex+hour_sin+hour_cos)^3,
  data=sanity_grid)[,-1]
prob_sanity <- predict(lasso_final_80, newx=X_sanity,
                       s="lambda.min", type="response")[,,1]
colnames(prob_sanity) <- levels(y_train_80)
rownames(prob_sanity) <- c("Forest","Roadside","RoadsideVeg")
cat("\nHD probabilities (Roadside must be highest):\n")
print(round(prob_sanity[,"Human Directed", drop=FALSE], 3))

```

```{r}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# MODEL 3: RIDGE (alpha = 0)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n══════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MODEL 3: RIDGE\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n")

cv_ridge <- matrix(NA, nrow=5, ncol=4,
                   dimnames=list(NULL, c("01","ll","br","sp")))

for (f in seq_along(folds)) {
  val_idx  <- folds[[f]]
  X_tr     <- X_train_80[-val_idx, ]
  X_val    <- X_train_80[ val_idx, ]
  y_tr     <- y_train_80[-val_idx]
  y_val    <- y_train_80[ val_idx]

  fit_tmp  <- cv.glmnet(X_tr, y_tr, family="multinomial", alpha=0, nfolds=5)
  prob_tmp <- predict(fit_tmp, newx=X_val, s="lambda.min", type="response")[,,1]
  colnames(prob_tmp) <- levels(y_tr)
  m <- compute_all_metrics(prob_tmp, y_val)
  cv_ridge[f, ] <- c(m$m_01, m$m_ll, m$m_br, m$m_sp)
}

cat(sprintf("CV 0-1 Loss: %.4f (SD: %.4f)\n",
            mean(cv_ridge[,"01"]), sd(cv_ridge[,"01"])))

set.seed(123)
ridge_final_80 <- cv.glmnet(
  x=X_train_80, y=y_train_80, family="multinomial", alpha=0, nfolds=10)

prob_ridge_test <- predict(ridge_final_80, newx=X_test_20,
                           s="lambda.min", type="response")[,,1]
colnames(prob_ridge_test) <- levels(y_test_20)
m_test <- compute_all_metrics(prob_ridge_test, y_test_20)

results$Ridge <- list(
  cv_01=mean(cv_ridge[,"01"]), cv_sd=sd(cv_ridge[,"01"]),
  cv_ll=mean(cv_ridge[,"ll"]), cv_ll_sd=sd(cv_ridge[,"ll"]),
  cv_br=mean(cv_ridge[,"br"]), cv_br_sd=sd(cv_ridge[,"br"]),
  cv_sp=mean(cv_ridge[,"sp"]), cv_sp_sd=sd(cv_ridge[,"sp"]),
  test_01=m_test$m_01, test_ll=m_test$m_ll,
  test_br=m_test$m_br, test_sp=m_test$m_sp
)
cat(sprintf("Test 0-1 Loss: %.4f\n", results$Ridge$test_01))
cat(sprintf("Test Log-Loss: %.4f\n", results$Ridge$test_ll))

```

```{r}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# MODEL 4: ELASTIC NET alpha = 0.5
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n══════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MODEL 4: ELASTIC NET (alpha=0.5)\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n")

cv_en05 <- matrix(NA, nrow=5, ncol=4,
                  dimnames=list(NULL, c("01","ll","br","sp")))

for (f in seq_along(folds)) {
  val_idx  <- folds[[f]]
  X_tr     <- X_train_80[-val_idx, ]
  X_val    <- X_train_80[ val_idx, ]
  y_tr     <- y_train_80[-val_idx]
  y_val    <- y_train_80[ val_idx]

  fit_tmp  <- cv.glmnet(X_tr, y_tr, family="multinomial", alpha=0.5, nfolds=5)
  prob_tmp <- predict(fit_tmp, newx=X_val, s="lambda.min", type="response")[,,1]
  colnames(prob_tmp) <- levels(y_tr)
  m <- compute_all_metrics(prob_tmp, y_val)
  cv_en05[f, ] <- c(m$m_01, m$m_ll, m$m_br, m$m_sp)
}

cat(sprintf("CV 0-1 Loss: %.4f (SD: %.4f)\n",
            mean(cv_en05[,"01"]), sd(cv_en05[,"01"])))

set.seed(123)
en05_final_80 <- cv.glmnet(
  x=X_train_80, y=y_train_80, family="multinomial", alpha=0.5, nfolds=10)

prob_en05_test <- predict(en05_final_80, newx=X_test_20,
                          s="lambda.min", type="response")[,,1]
colnames(prob_en05_test) <- levels(y_test_20)
m_test <- compute_all_metrics(prob_en05_test, y_test_20)

results$EN_05 <- list(
  cv_01=mean(cv_en05[,"01"]), cv_sd=sd(cv_en05[,"01"]),
  cv_ll=mean(cv_en05[,"ll"]), cv_ll_sd=sd(cv_en05[,"ll"]),
  cv_br=mean(cv_en05[,"br"]), cv_br_sd=sd(cv_en05[,"br"]),
  cv_sp=mean(cv_en05[,"sp"]), cv_sp_sd=sd(cv_en05[,"sp"]),
  test_01=m_test$m_01, test_ll=m_test$m_ll,
  test_br=m_test$m_br, test_sp=m_test$m_sp
)
cat(sprintf("Test 0-1 Loss: %.4f\n", results$EN_05$test_01))
cat(sprintf("Test Log-Loss: %.4f\n", results$EN_05$test_ll))

```

```{r}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# MODEL 5: ELASTIC NET alpha = 0.7
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n══════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MODEL 5: ELASTIC NET (alpha=0.7)\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n")

cv_en07 <- matrix(NA, nrow=5, ncol=4,
                  dimnames=list(NULL, c("01","ll","br","sp")))

for (f in seq_along(folds)) {
  val_idx  <- folds[[f]]
  X_tr     <- X_train_80[-val_idx, ]
  X_val    <- X_train_80[ val_idx, ]
  y_tr     <- y_train_80[-val_idx]
  y_val    <- y_train_80[ val_idx]

  fit_tmp  <- cv.glmnet(X_tr, y_tr, family="multinomial", alpha=0.7, nfolds=5)
  prob_tmp <- predict(fit_tmp, newx=X_val, s="lambda.min", type="response")[,,1]
  colnames(prob_tmp) <- levels(y_tr)
  m <- compute_all_metrics(prob_tmp, y_val)
  cv_en07[f, ] <- c(m$m_01, m$m_ll, m$m_br, m$m_sp)
}

cat(sprintf("CV 0-1 Loss: %.4f (SD: %.4f)\n",
            mean(cv_en07[,"01"]), sd(cv_en07[,"01"])))

set.seed(123)
en07_final_80 <- cv.glmnet(
  x=X_train_80, y=y_train_80, family="multinomial", alpha=0.7, nfolds=10)

prob_en07_test <- predict(en07_final_80, newx=X_test_20,
                          s="lambda.min", type="response")[,,1]
colnames(prob_en07_test) <- levels(y_test_20)
m_test <- compute_all_metrics(prob_en07_test, y_test_20)

results$EN_07 <- list(
  cv_01=mean(cv_en07[,"01"]), cv_sd=sd(cv_en07[,"01"]),
  cv_ll=mean(cv_en07[,"ll"]), cv_ll_sd=sd(cv_en07[,"ll"]),
  cv_br=mean(cv_en07[,"br"]), cv_br_sd=sd(cv_en07[,"br"]),
  cv_sp=mean(cv_en07[,"sp"]), cv_sp_sd=sd(cv_en07[,"sp"]),
  test_01=m_test$m_01, test_ll=m_test$m_ll,
  test_br=m_test$m_br, test_sp=m_test$m_sp
)
cat(sprintf("Test 0-1 Loss: %.4f\n", results$EN_07$test_01))
cat(sprintf("Test Log-Loss: %.4f\n", results$EN_07$test_ll))

```


```{r}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# MODEL 6: RANDOM FOREST
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n══════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MODEL 6: RANDOM FOREST\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n")

cv_rf <- matrix(NA, nrow=5, ncol=4,
                dimnames=list(NULL, c("01","ll","br","sp")))

set.seed(123)
for (f in seq_along(folds)) {
  val_idx  <- folds[[f]]
  X_tr     <- X_train_80[-val_idx, ]
  X_val    <- X_train_80[ val_idx, ]
  y_tr     <- y_train_80[-val_idx]
  y_val    <- y_train_80[ val_idx]

  fit_tmp  <- randomForest(x=X_tr, y=y_tr, ntree=500,
                           mtry=floor(sqrt(ncol(X_tr))))
  prob_tmp <- predict(fit_tmp, newdata=X_val, type="prob")
  m <- compute_all_metrics(prob_tmp, y_val)
  cv_rf[f, ] <- c(m$m_01, m$m_ll, m$m_br, m$m_sp)
}

cat(sprintf("CV 0-1 Loss: %.4f (SD: %.4f)\n",
            mean(cv_rf[,"01"]), sd(cv_rf[,"01"])))

set.seed(123)
rf_final_80 <- randomForest(
  x=X_train_80, y=y_train_80, ntree=500,
  mtry=floor(sqrt(ncol(X_train_80))))

prob_rf_test <- predict(rf_final_80, newdata=X_test_20, type="prob")
m_test       <- compute_all_metrics(prob_rf_test, y_test_20)

results$RF <- list(
  cv_01=mean(cv_rf[,"01"]), cv_sd=sd(cv_rf[,"01"]),
  cv_ll=mean(cv_rf[,"ll"]), cv_ll_sd=sd(cv_rf[,"ll"]),
  cv_br=mean(cv_rf[,"br"]), cv_br_sd=sd(cv_rf[,"br"]),
  cv_sp=mean(cv_rf[,"sp"]), cv_sp_sd=sd(cv_rf[,"sp"]),
  test_01=m_test$m_01, test_ll=m_test$m_ll,
  test_br=m_test$m_br, test_sp=m_test$m_sp
)
cat(sprintf("Test 0-1 Loss: %.4f\n", results$RF$test_01))
cat(sprintf("Test Log-Loss: %.4f\n", results$RF$test_ll))

```

```{r}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# MODEL 7: NEURAL NETWORK (nnet)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n══════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MODEL 7: NEURAL NETWORK (nnet)\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n")

X_train_norm <- scale(X_train_80)
X_test_norm  <- scale(X_test_20,
                      center = attr(X_train_norm, "scaled:center"),
                      scale  = attr(X_train_norm, "scaled:scale"))

cv_nn <- matrix(NA, nrow=5, ncol=4,
                dimnames=list(NULL, c("01","ll","br","sp")))

for (f in seq_along(folds)) {
  val_idx  <- folds[[f]]
  X_tr     <- X_train_norm[-val_idx, ]
  X_val    <- X_train_norm[ val_idx, ]
  y_tr     <- y_train_80[-val_idx]
  y_val    <- y_train_80[ val_idx]

  fit_tmp  <- nnet(x=X_tr, y=class.ind(y_tr), size=5, decay=0.1,
                   maxit=200, softmax=TRUE, trace=FALSE)
  # FIX: use which.max on raw prob matrix — type="class" invalid with softmax+class.ind
  prob_tmp <- predict(fit_tmp, newdata=X_val)
  colnames(prob_tmp) <- levels(y_tr)
  m <- compute_all_metrics(prob_tmp, y_val)
  cv_nn[f, ] <- c(m$m_01, m$m_ll, m$m_br, m$m_sp)
}

cat(sprintf("CV 0-1 Loss: %.4f (SD: %.4f)\n",
            mean(cv_nn[,"01"]), sd(cv_nn[,"01"])))

set.seed(123)
nn_final_80 <- nnet(x=X_train_norm, y=class.ind(y_train_80),
                    size=5, decay=0.1, maxit=500, softmax=TRUE, trace=FALSE)

prob_nn_test <- predict(nn_final_80, newdata=X_test_norm, type="raw")
colnames(prob_nn_test) <- levels(y_train_80)
m_test <- compute_all_metrics(prob_nn_test, y_test_20)

results$NN <- list(
  cv_01=mean(cv_nn[,"01"]), cv_sd=sd(cv_nn[,"01"]),
  cv_ll=mean(cv_nn[,"ll"]), cv_ll_sd=sd(cv_nn[,"ll"]),
  cv_br=mean(cv_nn[,"br"]), cv_br_sd=sd(cv_nn[,"br"]),
  cv_sp=mean(cv_nn[,"sp"]), cv_sp_sd=sd(cv_nn[,"sp"]),
  test_01=m_test$m_01, test_ll=m_test$m_ll,
  test_br=m_test$m_br, test_sp=m_test$m_sp
)
cat(sprintf("Test 0-1 Loss: %.4f\n", results$NN$test_01))
cat(sprintf("Test Log-Loss: %.4f\n", results$NN$test_ll))

```

```{r}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# MODEL 8: KERAS DEEP NEURAL NETWORK
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n══════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MODEL 8: KERAS DEEP NEURAL NETWORK\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n")

library(keras)

n_classes   <- length(levels(y_train_80))
y_train_int <- as.integer(y_train_80) - 1L
y_test_int  <- as.integer(y_test_20)  - 1L
y_train_oh  <- to_categorical(y_train_int, num_classes = n_classes)
y_test_oh   <- to_categorical(y_test_int,  num_classes = n_classes)

X_train_k <- as.matrix(X_train_norm)
X_test_k  <- as.matrix(X_test_norm)

grid <- expand.grid(
  layer1  = c(8, 16, 32),
  layer2  = c(0, 4, 8),
  dropout = c(0, 0.2, 0.3),
  l2_reg  = c(0.001, 0.01),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

cat(sprintf("Grid search: %d architectures\n", nrow(grid)))

best_cv_error <- Inf
best_cv_sd    <- NA
best_params   <- NULL
grid_results  <- data.frame()

build_model <- function(l1, l2_nodes, do, l2r) {
  model <- keras_model_sequential()
  model %>%
    layer_dense(units=l1, activation="relu",
                input_shape=ncol(X_train_k),
                kernel_regularizer=regularizer_l2(l2r))
  if (do > 0) model %>% layer_dropout(rate=do)
  if (l2_nodes > 0) {
    model %>%
      layer_dense(units=l2_nodes, activation="relu",
                  kernel_regularizer=regularizer_l2(l2r))
    if (do > 0) model %>% layer_dropout(rate=do)
  }
  model %>% layer_dense(units=n_classes, activation="softmax")
  model %>% compile(loss="categorical_crossentropy",
                    optimizer=optimizer_adam(), metrics=c("accuracy"))
  model
}

for (i in seq_len(nrow(grid))) {
  p          <- grid[i, ]
  cv_keras_i <- matrix(NA, nrow=5, ncol=4,
                       dimnames=list(NULL, c("01","ll","br","sp")))

  for (f in seq_along(folds)) {
    val_idx <- folds[[f]]
    X_tr_k  <- X_train_k[-val_idx, ];  X_val_k <- X_train_k[ val_idx, ]
    y_tr_k  <- y_train_oh[-val_idx, ]; y_val_k <- y_train_oh[ val_idx, ]
    y_val   <- y_train_80[val_idx]

    m <- build_model(p$layer1, p$layer2, p$dropout, p$l2_reg)
    m %>% fit(X_tr_k, y_tr_k, epochs=50, batch_size=32,
              validation_data=list(X_val_k, y_val_k), verbose=0)

    prob_tmp <- m %>% predict(X_val_k)
    colnames(prob_tmp) <- levels(y_train_80)
    met <- compute_all_metrics(prob_tmp, y_val)
    cv_keras_i[f, ] <- c(met$m_01, met$m_ll, met$m_br, met$m_sp)
  }

  cv_err <- mean(cv_keras_i[,"01"])
  grid_results <- rbind(grid_results, data.frame(
    layer1=p$layer1, layer2=p$layer2, dropout=p$dropout, l2_reg=p$l2_reg,
    cv_01=cv_err,         cv_01_sd=sd(cv_keras_i[,"01"]),
    cv_ll=mean(cv_keras_i[,"ll"]), cv_ll_sd=sd(cv_keras_i[,"ll"]),
    cv_br=mean(cv_keras_i[,"br"]), cv_br_sd=sd(cv_keras_i[,"br"]),
    cv_sp=mean(cv_keras_i[,"sp"]), cv_sp_sd=sd(cv_keras_i[,"sp"])))

  cat(sprintf("  [%2d/%d] L1=%2d L2=%d DO=%.1f L2R=%.3f → CV=%.4f\n",
              i, nrow(grid), p$layer1, p$layer2, p$dropout, p$l2_reg, cv_err))

  if (cv_err < best_cv_error) {
    best_cv_error <- cv_err
    best_cv_sd    <- sd(cv_keras_i[,"01"])
    best_cv_ll    <- mean(cv_keras_i[,"ll"]); best_cv_ll_sd <- sd(cv_keras_i[,"ll"])
    best_cv_br    <- mean(cv_keras_i[,"br"]); best_cv_br_sd <- sd(cv_keras_i[,"br"])
    best_cv_sp    <- mean(cv_keras_i[,"sp"]); best_cv_sp_sd <- sd(cv_keras_i[,"sp"])
    best_params   <- p
  }
}

cat(sprintf("\nBest architecture: Layer1=%d Layer2=%d Dropout=%.1f L2=%.3f\n",
            best_params$layer1, best_params$layer2,
            best_params$dropout, best_params$l2_reg))
cat(sprintf("Best CV 0-1 Loss: %.4f (SD: %.4f)\n", best_cv_error, best_cv_sd))

# Print top 5 architectures ranked by CV 0-1 loss
cat("\nTop 5 Keras architectures by CV 0-1 Loss:\n")
top5 <- head(grid_results[order(grid_results$cv_01), ], 5)
cat(sprintf("  %-4s %-4s %-5s %-6s  %8s  %8s  %8s  %8s\n",
            "L1","L2","Drop","L2Reg","CV 0-1","CV LL","CV Brier","CV Sph"))
cat(strrep("-", 60), "\n")
for (j in seq_len(nrow(top5))) {
  r <- top5[j, ]
  cat(sprintf("  %-4d %-4d %-5.1f %-6.3f  %8.4f  %8.4f  %8.4f  %8.4f\n",
              r$layer1, r$layer2, r$dropout, r$l2_reg,
              r$cv_01, r$cv_ll, r$cv_br, r$cv_sp))
}

write.csv(grid_results, "keras_deep_nn_gridsearch.csv", row.names=FALSE)

# Refit best architecture on full training set
keras_final_80 <- build_model(best_params$layer1, best_params$layer2,
                               best_params$dropout, best_params$l2_reg)
keras_final_80 %>% fit(X_train_k, y_train_oh, epochs=100,
                       batch_size=32, verbose=0)

prob_keras_test <- keras_final_80 %>% predict(X_test_k)
colnames(prob_keras_test) <- levels(y_train_80)
m_test <- compute_all_metrics(prob_keras_test, y_test_20)

results$Keras <- list(
  cv_01=best_cv_error,  cv_sd=best_cv_sd,
  cv_ll=best_cv_ll,     cv_ll_sd=best_cv_ll_sd,
  cv_br=best_cv_br,     cv_br_sd=best_cv_br_sd,
  cv_sp=best_cv_sp,     cv_sp_sd=best_cv_sp_sd,
  test_01=m_test$m_01, test_ll=m_test$m_ll,
  test_br=m_test$m_br, test_sp=m_test$m_sp
)
cat(sprintf("Test 0-1 Loss: %.4f\n", results$Keras$test_01))
cat(sprintf("Test Log-Loss: %.4f\n", results$Keras$test_ll))

keras_final_80 %>% save_model_hdf5("keras_best_model.h5")
cat("Keras model saved: keras_best_model.h5\n")

```


```{r}

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 9: MODEL COMPARISON TABLES
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
model_names <- c("MNLR","LASSO","Ridge","EN_05","EN_07","RF","NN","Keras")

# ── TABLE 1: TRAINING CV ERROR ────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("TABLE 1 — TRAINING CV ERROR (5-fold, mean ± SD)\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat(sprintf("%-10s  %12s  %12s  %12s  %12s\n",
            "Model","0-1 Loss","Log-Loss","Brier","Spherical"))
cat(strrep("-", 66), "\n")

for (nm in model_names) {
  r <- results[[nm]]
  if (is.null(r)) next
  cat(sprintf("%-10s  %5.4f±%5.4f  %5.4f±%5.4f  %5.4f±%5.4f  %5.4f±%5.4f\n",
              nm,
              r$cv_01, r$cv_sd,
              r$cv_ll, r$cv_ll_sd,
              r$cv_br, r$cv_br_sd,
              r$cv_sp, r$cv_sp_sd))
}
cat(strrep("-", 66), "\n")
cat("Lower 0-1 Loss, Log-Loss, Brier = better | Higher Spherical = better\n\n")

# ── TABLE 2: TEST ERROR ───────────────────────────────────────────
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("TABLE 2 — TEST ERROR (held-out 20%)\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat(sprintf("%-10s  %10s  %10s  %10s  %10s\n",
            "Model","0-1 Loss","Log-Loss","Brier","Spherical"))
cat(strrep("-", 54), "\n")

for (nm in model_names) {
  r <- results[[nm]]
  if (is.null(r)) next
  cat(sprintf("%-10s  %10.4f  %10.4f  %10.4f  %10.4f\n",
              nm, r$test_01, r$test_ll, r$test_br, r$test_sp))
}
cat(strrep("-", 54), "\n")
cat("Lower 0-1 Loss, Log-Loss, Brier = better | Higher Spherical = better\n\n")

# ── SAVE CSVs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cv_df <- data.frame(
  Model       = model_names,
  CV_01Loss   = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$cv_01),
  CV_01SD     = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$cv_sd),
  CV_LogLoss  = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$cv_ll),
  CV_LL_SD    = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$cv_ll_sd),
  CV_Brier    = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$cv_br),
  CV_Brier_SD = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$cv_br_sd),
  CV_Sph      = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$cv_sp),
  CV_Sph_SD   = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$cv_sp_sd)
)

test_df <- data.frame(
  Model     = model_names,
  Test_01   = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$test_01),
  LogLoss   = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$test_ll),
  Brier     = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$test_br),
  Spherical = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$test_sp)
)

write.csv(cv_df,   "cv_error_comparison.csv",   row.names=FALSE)
write.csv(test_df, "test_error_comparison.csv",  row.names=FALSE)
cat("Saved: cv_error_comparison.csv\n")
cat("Saved: test_error_comparison.csv\n")

cat("\n══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("ANALYSIS COMPLETE\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("Key objects in environment:\n")
cat("  lasso_final_80  — final LASSO model\n")
cat("  rf_final_80     — final Random Forest model\n")
cat("  nn_final_80     — final nnet Neural Network\n")
cat("  keras_final_80  — final Keras Deep NN\n")
cat("  train_80        — training data\n")
cat("  test_20         — test data\n")
cat("  X_train_80      — 36-col training matrix\n")
cat("  X_test_20       — 36-col test matrix\n")
cat("  y_train_80      — training outcome factor\n")
cat("  y_test_20       — test outcome factor\n")

```
```{r}
# ── Reformat CV table — mean only, no ± SD ──────────────────────

model_names <- c("MNLR","LASSO","Ridge","EN_05","EN_07","RF","NN","Keras")

cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("TABLE 1 — TRAINING CV ERROR (5-fold mean)\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")
cat(sprintf("%-10s  %10s  %10s  %10s  %10s\n",
            "Model", "0-1 Loss", "Log-Loss", "Brier", "Spherical"))
cat(strrep("-", 56), "\n")

for (nm in model_names) {
  r <- results[[nm]]
  if (is.null(r)) next
  cat(sprintf("%-10s  %10.4f  %10.4f  %10.4f  %10.4f\n",
              nm, r$cv_01, r$cv_ll, r$cv_br, r$cv_sp))
}

cat(strrep("-", 56), "\n")
cat("Lower 0-1 Loss, Log-Loss, Brier = better\n")
cat("Higher Spherical = better\n\n")

# Save clean version
cv_clean_df <- data.frame(
  Model     = model_names,
  CV_01Loss = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$cv_01),
  CV_LogLoss= sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$cv_ll),
  CV_Brier  = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$cv_br),
  CV_Sph    = sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$cv_sp)
)
write.csv(cv_clean_df, "cv_error_training.csv", row.names=FALSE)
cat("Saved: cv_error_means_only.csv\n")
```


```{r}

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 10: BEST MODEL SUMMARY
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
cat("\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("BEST MODEL SUMMARY\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

model_names <- c("MNLR","LASSO","Ridge","EN_05","EN_07","RF","NN","Keras")

# Extract all metrics into vectors
cv_01_vec  <- sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$cv_01)
cv_ll_vec  <- sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$cv_ll)
cv_br_vec  <- sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$cv_br)
cv_sp_vec  <- sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$cv_sp)

test_01_vec <- sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$test_01)
test_ll_vec <- sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$test_ll)
test_br_vec <- sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$test_br)
test_sp_vec <- sapply(model_names, function(n) results[[n]]$test_sp)

# Best model per metric (lower is better except Spherical)
best_cv <- data.frame(
  Metric       = c("0-1 Loss","Log-Loss","Brier","Spherical"),
  Best_Model   = c(
    model_names[which.min(cv_01_vec)],
    model_names[which.min(cv_ll_vec)],
    model_names[which.min(cv_br_vec)],
    model_names[which.max(cv_sp_vec)]   # higher is better
  ),
  Best_Value   = c(
    min(cv_01_vec, na.rm=TRUE),
    min(cv_ll_vec, na.rm=TRUE),
    min(cv_br_vec, na.rm=TRUE),
    max(cv_sp_vec, na.rm=TRUE)
  )
)

best_test <- data.frame(
  Metric       = c("0-1 Loss","Log-Loss","Brier","Spherical"),
  Best_Model   = c(
    model_names[which.min(test_01_vec)],
    model_names[which.min(test_ll_vec)],
    model_names[which.min(test_br_vec)],
    model_names[which.max(test_sp_vec)]
  ),
  Best_Value   = c(
    min(test_01_vec, na.rm=TRUE),
    min(test_ll_vec, na.rm=TRUE),
    min(test_br_vec, na.rm=TRUE),
    max(test_sp_vec, na.rm=TRUE)
  )
)

cat("── Best model by TRAINING CV metric ──────────────────────────\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-12s  %-12s  %s\n", "Metric", "Best Model", "Value"))
cat(strrep("-", 40), "\n")
for (i in seq_len(nrow(best_cv))) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-12s  %-12s  %.4f\n",
              best_cv$Metric[i], best_cv$Best_Model[i], best_cv$Best_Value[i]))
}

cat("\n── Best model by TEST metric ─────────────────────────────────\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-12s  %-12s  %s\n", "Metric", "Best Model", "Value"))
cat(strrep("-", 40), "\n")
for (i in seq_len(nrow(best_test))) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-12s  %-12s  %.4f\n",
              best_test$Metric[i], best_test$Best_Model[i], best_test$Best_Value[i]))
}

# Overall best model by majority vote across all 8 metric slots
all_best <- c(as.character(best_cv$Best_Model),
              as.character(best_test$Best_Model))
vote_table <- sort(table(all_best), decreasing = TRUE)

cat("\n── Overall best model (majority vote across all metrics) ─────\n")
cat(sprintf("  %s wins %d/%d metric comparisons\n",
            names(vote_table)[1], vote_table[1], length(all_best)))
print(vote_table)

# Save best model summary
write.csv(best_cv,   "best_model_cv.csv",   row.names=FALSE)
write.csv(best_test, "best_model_test.csv", row.names=FALSE)
cat("\nSaved: best_model_cv.csv\n")
cat("Saved: best_model_test.csv\n")

```
